name: A replay attack was detected
definition: Windows Security Event ID 4649 records A replay attack was detected.
trigger_scenarios: Windows logs the event when the audited security operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: Package Name and Account Name identify replay context; a detected Kerberos replay should be escalated immediately and the Session ID correlated with Type 3 or Type 10 logons.
The initiating account and Logon ID support attribution and correlation to 4624 and 4688.
The affected host determines the operational impact.

false_positives: Documented maintenance, policy changes, or approved administration can generate this event.
Validate change control and host role before suppressing.

attck_mapping.technique_name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Pass the Ticket

detection_notes: Package Name and Account Name identify replay context; a detected Kerberos replay should be escalated immediately and the Session ID correlated with Type 3 or Type 10 logons. This is a T1550.003 Use Alternate Authentication Material: Pass the Ticket signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the actor, process, and related events.
kql_snippet:
SecurityEvent
| where EventID == 4649
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account
